name: proxyshield-11
description: ProxyShield-11 - Unified Identity Protection System with Blockchain & AI

scripts.start:all: concurrently -n "backend,ai,frontend" -c "blue,yellow,green" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd Backend && npm install && cd ../Frontend/dashboard && npm install
scripts.setup:ai: cd "AI Engine" && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\pip.exe install -r requirements.txt

author: ProxyShield Team
